name: grid-n1-ieee33-golden
notes: Radial Baran & Wu 33-bus: opening any of the 32 in-service lines islands the downstream feeder section, so all contingencies classify as islanding and no power flow is attempted. br-17 feeds only bus-18 (load 90 kW = 0.09 MW); br-1 feeds the whole network (total load 3715 kW = 3.715 MW). Tie switches br-33..br-37 are OPEN and therefore not screened. results are ordered by branch index, so results[17] is br-17.
